title: Implement critic sprite C as winner

log.context: Implement critic sprite C as winner

The system is fully dynamic — the winner is fetched from the API and the correct sprite variant (`drawSprite_critic_C`) is used at render time. No static code changes are needed; the API already returns `"winner": "C"` with 2 votes out of 3 quorum.

There's no hardcoded "active sprite" function that needs to be updated. The architecture uses the vote API to determine which variant to draw. Since the API already reports C as the winner, the critic sprite on grazing.html is already showing variant...(truncated)
